patch.value: Consolidate the 8 list-* status variants into pm list --status (list-all/open/draft/in-progress/blocked/closed/canceled become hidden aliases)

list, list-all, list-draft, list-open, list-in-progress, list-blocked, list-closed, list-canceled collapse to pm list with --status (multi-value) and --all; the 7 variant spellings become alias-table entries. Duplicate check: pm-gdi7 touches list-closed projection verbosity only; no consolidation item exists.

pm list --status <s...> and --all cover every variant behavior incl. per-variant defaults; all 8 old spellings still work via alias shim with identical output; help shows only pm list; contracts/MCP/completions/docs regenerated; existing list-* tests pass unchanged against aliases
